collection.name: Foton Genesis
collection.description: The genesis collection of Foton — the Base-native NFT marketplace. Free mint for early users, pay gas only. 2000 unique pieces.
collection.collectionImagePrompt: A stunning promotional banner for Foton Genesis NFT collection — photon particles and light waves exploding from a central prism, dark cosmic background, neon cyan and electric purple energy trails, futuristic digital art, no text
collection.tokenImagePrompt: A photon particle portrait with light wave energy trails, dark cosmic background, neon cyan and electric purple glow, futuristic digital art, square 1:1 composition, no text, unique light patterns and energy fields for each piece
